chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-24 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 23.06.2023 Applicant present in person. Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari advocate for respondent No.1. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- I have heard applicant. He has filed transfer application on the ground that presiding officer of the court is issuing threats to them. However, no such proof is available on record. It appears that only in order to cause delay in the trial, this application by the applicant who is accused has been filed. In view of above, this application is dismissed. JUDGE Ali Haider
